subcodes.first_line: O Lutfu'llah! It is observed that thou hast turned toward Him Who is wronged throughout all regions, and hast advanced to a station wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا لطف الله مشاهده میشود که بمظلوم آفاق توجه نموده و بمقامی اقبال جسته که
